subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that speaketh with truth and calleth the people unto the Best-Beloved of them that know, were there to be revealed unto the servants that which was treasured [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق و یدعوا الناس الی محبوب العارفین ولو یظهر علی العباد ما کنز
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @power of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment
